data.title: Account Security
data.description: Implementations such as two-factor authentication and suspicious login detection protect user accounts.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: User data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to protect user privacy and confidentiality.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular security audits and a bug bounty program help identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.

data.title: Privacy Controls
data.description: Multiple layers of permissions and privacy settings allow users to control their data visibility.

data.title: Fraud Detection Algorithms
data.description: Smart algorithms to detect and prevent fake accounts and spam activities.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models for anomaly detection.
